title: leontodon × grassiorum
intro: Leontodon × grassiorum, also known as Hawkbit, is a hybrid species of wildflower that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leontodon × grassiorum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
